name: pm-flow-kit

skills.name: pm-flow
skills.role: Workflow orchestration: stages, state, artifacts, decisions, and gates

skills.name: pm-research
skills.role: Research-stage opportunity, user, market, competitor, benchmark, metric context, source-risk, assumption, and open-question analysis

skills.name: pm-requirement-analysis
skills.role: Requirement analysis, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, and artifact plan before PRD, prototype, diagram, or review output

skills.name: pm-metrics-definition
skills.role: Product success, input, guardrail, baseline, data source, owner, and threshold definitions

skills.name: pm-boundary
skills.role: Boundary-stage scope, non-scope, stakeholders, roles, permissions, surfaces, system ownership, constraints, dependencies, assumptions, risks, and decisions

skills.name: pm-prd
skills.role: PRD sizing, L1/L2/L3 templates, field dictionary, acceptance criteria, and quality checks

skills.name: pm-prototype-review
skills.role: Prototype review artifacts that connect UI elements, rules, fields, and review findings

skills.name: pm-html-prototype
skills.role: Offline HTML prototype scaffold, device frames, fonts, design guideline use, component mapping, and validation

skills.name: pm-context-contract
skills.role: Domain rules, knowledge-base manifests, input constraints, and scoped context reading rules

skills.name: pm-mermaid-diagram
skills.role: Mermaid flowcharts, swimlane-style flows, state diagrams, sequence diagrams, and architecture diagrams

skills.name: pm-review
skills.role: Independent product artifact review for requirement analysis, metrics, boundary, PRDs, prototypes, diagrams, risks, decisions, and readiness

skills.name: humanizer
skills.role: Product document language polishing without changing facts

bundled_assets.name: design-system
bundled_assets.role: Code-first design system (Web = Ant Design v5; PDA = antd-mobile). Baked in, NOT an external reference. Preferred source for 云仓/AntD projects; pm-html-prototype stays general and uses it optionally.

constraints: Keep pm-flow-kit self-contained; do not depend on external PM skill routing.
Do not add new pm-flow stages.

Run context confirmation, requirement analysis, metrics definition, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, and artifact planning before PRD, HTML prototype, diagram, review, or humanizer output.
Use pm-research for the research stage when the flow includes research.
Use pm-boundary for the boundary stage artifacts.
Use pm-review for the general review stage; use pm-prototype-review only for prototype-specific review artifacts.
Use pm-prd as the default PRD entry.
Use humanizer only for language polish; do not change requirement facts, scope, acceptance criteria, or decisions.
Do not default to Ant Design; use it only when the project knowledge base or user explicitly specifies Ant Design, antd, ProComponents, or Ant Design X.
description_zh: A self-contained product management skill package: pm-flow controls workflow; pm-context-contract confirms context; pm-requirement-analysis produces requirement analysis, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, and artifact plan; pm-metrics-definition defines product metrics; pm-prd creates PRDs, field dictionaries, and acceptance criteria; pm-html-prototype creates HTML prototypes; pm-prototype-review creates optional review artifacts; pm-mermaid-diagram creates standalone diagrams; humanizer polishes product writing.（WorkBuddy 适配版，已去 Codex 化）

stages_zh.description_zh: Complete opportunity, user, market, competitor, and metric context.
Define scope, non-scope, assumptions, priorities, and stakeholders.
Generate HTML prototypes when needed; create review artifacts only when requirement analysis says they are needed.
Create an L1, L2, or L3 PRD according to requirement size.
Check risks, close findings, and confirm delivery readiness.

constraints_zh: Keep pm-flow-kit self-contained and do not depend on package-external routing.
Do not add new pm-flow stages.
Complete requirement analysis, metrics definition, scenario catalog, use cases, end-to-end flow, and artifact planning before PRD, HTML prototype, diagram, review artifact, or humanizer output.
Research 阶段使用 pm-research；boundary 阶段使用 pm-boundary；review 阶段使用 pm-review，原型专项评审才用 pm-prototype-review。
Use pm-prd as the default PRD entry.
Use humanizer only for expression; do not change requirement facts, scope, acceptance criteria, or decisions.

pm-html-prototype consumes the kit design-system/ (tokens.css + .yc-* components; Web=AntD v5, PDA=antd-mobile) as its single token source; the scaffold snapshots it into each prototype. For other design languages, follow user-supplied guidelines. Do not bundle a second token set.
Use pm-prototype-review only when requirement analysis says a prototype review artifact is needed.
Do not default to Ant Design; use it only when project knowledge or the user explicitly specifies it.
usage_notice: Internal use only. Not for public release or redistribution.
